name: Arslan Mushtaq
title: Senior / Lead React Native Engineer
tagline: I architect and scale mobile platforms that ship to millions.
summary: I architect and scale React Native platforms in regulated industries like fintech and health-tech with a track record of eliminating manual QA dependency (100% → 20%), slashing build times by 85%, and shipping products used by 1M+ users. I specialise in server-driven UI, micro-frontend architecture (Re.pack), and building the CI/CD and observability infrastructure that keeps production stable at scale.
